name: Ranch Flavored Oyster Crackers
recipeIngredient: 1 package Hidden Valley Ranch buttermilk recipe mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the Hidden Valley Ranch buttermilk recipe mix and salad oil.
2. Add dill weed, garlic powder, and lemon pepper to the mixture.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Place the oyster crackers in a serving dish.
5. Pour the dressing over the crackers, ensuring they are evenly coated.
6. Transfer the dish to a warm oven (approximately 200°F/95°C).
7. Allow the crackers to heat for 15-20 minutes, or until warmed through.
